Exact translation of tamil words

Asandhaapula alliputaaney
adimanadhil andiputtaaney

azhaga poo pookka vittaaney

Vetkathula vikka vachaaney
vetpathula sikka vachaaney
pasupuraney malupuraney sodhapuraney

alangaari alatikitteney
alungaama alliputtaney
adikiraney dhinam dhinamum nadikiraney

Avaga ada avaga ulla manasil
nulangi maruga
kaduga indha kaduga avan kadikka
nenachi karuga
en nenpil kudhikuraaney
en manasil kulikiraaney
enna paduthi eduthu
kulapi keduthu paduthuraaney

En manasu kanna pinnaa aasayinaala
athukittu odudhupaar goppanthannaala (2)

Nenaputhaan pozhapayum kedukudhu
kedukattum un nenapu
varavara adikadi sirikuren
manasula un nenape

Asandhaapula alliputaaney
adimanadhil andiputtaaney
naan paatula suthu vandheyney
nagangadikka kathu thandhaaney

Vetkathula vikka vachaaney
vetpathula sikka vachaaney
pasupuraney malupuraney sodhapuraney

alangaari alatikitteney

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Angnyaade?

The song Angnyaade expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, conveyed through poetic lyrics.

What is the plot context of Raja Rani where this song is featured?

Raja Rani revolves around the complexities of love and relationships, showcasing the journey of the lead characters.

Who is the singer of Angnyaade?

The song is sung by the talented Shakthisree Gopalan, known for her melodious voice.

Who composed the music for Angnyaade?

The music for Angnyaade was composed by GV Prakash Kumar, a prominent figure in Tamil cinema music.

When was Angnyaade released?

Angnyaade was released on August 24, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Angnyaade, the protagonist expresses their heartfelt emotions, reflecting the beauty and tenderness of love. The song serves as a pivotal moment in Raja Rani, where the characters navigate their feelings and relationships. With its soothing melody and romantic lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This enchanting track beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for weddings and romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Angnyaade from Raja Rani is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Shakthisree Gopalan's enchanting vocals and GV Prakash Kumar's soulful composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the romantic vibes and let the soothing lyrics take you on a journey of emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Angnyaade Angnyaade yehe yeye Angnyaade Angnyaade
In the garden of flowers, like a beautiful flower blooming, it has blossomed in the midst of the beautiful ones.
In the field, it has been planted, in the forest, it has been hidden, like a divine being, like a beautiful being, like a pure being.
I have adorned myself, I have dressed up beautifully, like a beautiful flower, every day it flows like a river.
Angnyaade Angnyaade yehe yeye Angnyaade Angnyaade
That is how it is, in the heart, it flows like a river, this river, he thinks of me, he drinks from my heart, he bathes in my thoughts, he takes and gives me joy.
My heart is like a child, it runs away with desire, with great joy.
Memories come and go, they come and go, your memories come and go, I smile suddenly in my heart because of your memories.
In the garden of flowers, like a beautiful flower blooming, I have come to sing, it has given me joy.
In the field, it has been planted, in the forest, it has been hidden, like a divine being, like a beautiful being, like a pure being.
I have adorned myself, I have dressed up beautifully, like a beautiful flower, every day it flows like a river.
Angnyaade Angnyaade yehe yeye Angnyaade Angnyaade
